feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business Technology Platform
feed.subtitle: SAP Business Technology Platform Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Failed to fetch oAuth token from IFlow
entry.content:
Hi CPI Experts,

I am trying to fetch a set of data using IFlow from an api which is publically available and secured with oAuth.
I have created a security material with the following details:

Then I am using this in the IFlow as 

 

When I trigger the IFlow, fetching auth token fails with the error:

com.google.common.util.concurrent.UncheckedExecutionException: java.lang.IllegalArgumentException: Exception occured while fetching OAuth Token. Reason: mysite.com: Name or service not known, cause: java.net.UnknownHostException: mysite.com: Name or service not known

 

I have tested the API and credential from Bruno and it is working, which indicates that there is no issue with the application server.

Any inputs are much appreciated.
Thanks.

entry.title: SAP DRC in BTP Trial?
entry.content: Hi, is there a way to try out SAP DRC, Cloud Edition in my BTP trial?

entry.title: What business trend is currently having the biggest impact on your SAP projects?
entry.content: I feel like there’s always a new “big thing” everyone is talking about, lately it has been AI, clean core, cloud, UX… but I’m not sure all of them actually change what we do day to day. I wanted to ask if you really see a difference in your projects with all these trends. I mean, is there something that really made a difference?  Something that actually changed how you work, not just something that sounds good in presentations.

entry.title: How to combine SAP Application Management Services (AMS) with corporate IDP?
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

For BTP applications, SAP recommendeds to use AMS for authorisation in future. For this to be possible, users must exist in the Identity Directory of the SAP Cloud Identity Services.

In an enterprise environment, the situation typically looks like this:

  • Employees are managed in the corporate IDP (e.g. Entra ID).
  • The corporate IDP is connected to the SAP Cloud Identity Service
  • A trust exists between the BTP subaccount and the SAP Cloud Identity Services 

In this standard scenario, users are not created in the Identity Directory, but simply routed through SAP Cloud Identity Services. Consequently, no AMS policies can be assigned.

One option would be to use Identity Federation to move users from the Corporate IDP to the Identity Directory. However, in the case of Entra ID, this sync only runs every 40 minutes. Therefore, this is not really a viable solution.

In the past, shadow users were automatically created in SAP Cloud Identity Services, but this is no longer the case and we cannot find an option to enable it.

What is the intended solution? Can AMS not be used in conjunction with a corporate IDP?

Thank you for your response!

entry.title: What tends to create the most complexity in your SAP integrations today?
entry.content:
As you read in the caption, maybe Data, APIs, or process orchestration? Lately it feels like SAP integrations get complicated faster than expected. What starts simple ends up having a lot more moving parts.

In your experience, what’s usually the biggest source of that complexity?

entry.title: After moving to RISE with SAP, what changed the most in your operating model or delivery approach?
entry.content:
Moving to RISE with SAP is often framed as a technical shift, but in practice, it tends to change how teams actually work.

Things like ownership, decision-making, and even how delivery is structured don’t always stay the same. In some cases, processes become more standardized; in others, teams need to adapt in ways they didn’t fully expect.

If you’ve gone through that transition, what changed the most for you in your operating model or delivery approach?

entry.title: Joule Studio: Why is build_default required if standard plan exists?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I’m currently setting up Joule Studio in SAP BTP and reviewing the prerequisites.

According to the documentation, Joule Studio requires an entitlement for SAP Build Process Automation with the service plan “build_default”.

However, in my subaccount I already have the “standard” (standard-application) plan assigned, which provides full production capabilities for SAP Build Process Automation (workflows, RPA, monitoring, etc.).

From my understanding:

  • The standard plan offers full functionality for productive use

  • The build_default plan seems to provide a more limited or base-level feature set

This raises a concern, as introducing or switching to build_default could potentially limit existing capabilities.

My questions are:

  1. Is the build_default plan technically required for Joule Studio, even if the standard plan is already available?

  2. Is there a dependency or integration requirement that specifically relies on build_default?

  3. Can both plans coexist without impacting existing Build Process Automation scenarios?

  4. What is the recommended entitlement setup for using Joule Studio in a productive BTP environment?

Any clarification or best practices would be highly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Unable to View Subaccount in BTP Cockpit After CIS Trust Setup (403 – Global Account Undefined)
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am facing an issue accessing a BTP subaccount when logging in via SAP Cloud Identity Services (CIS), even though trust and role assignments are in place.

Setup details:

  • Trust configured between CIS tenant and SAP BTP Global Account (for platform users)
  • Login performed using the BTP cockpit URL with https://amer.cockpit.btp.cloud.sap/cockpit/?idp=<CIAS_TENANT>
  • Platform user:
    • Successfully authenticates via CIS
    • Added to the target subaccount
    • Assigned Subaccount Viewer role collection

Issue observed:

  • After login, the BTP cockpit shows:
    • “Global Account: undefined – Account Explorer”
    • 403 error: “Could not load global account”
  • No global account, directories, or subaccounts are visible

Based on the role assignment, at least read-only access to the subaccount was expected.

You can refer below image

Questions:

  1. Are there any mandatory Global Account–level role collections (e.g. Global Account Viewer / Directory Viewer) required for CIS-authenticated platform users to see subaccounts?
  2. Is there any additional setup or user assignment step required beyond:
    • CIS trust configuration
    • Subaccount role collection assignment?

Any guidance or pointers on missing prerequisites or common pitfalls for CIS + BTP cockpit access would be helpful.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: How are you approaching extensibility while trying to maintain a clean core in S/4HANA?
entry.content:
Seeing this come up a lot lately with SAP S/4HANA. Everyone wants a clean core until the business asks for something that doesn’t fit standard. 

Of course extensions wil happen but how do you keep things from turning into chaos again over time? Are you going more side-by-side, in-app, or just figuring it out case by case?

entry.title: Regarding Claude Mythos
entry.content:
We are startup which focuses on disruptive thinking, Advanced MCP Agents, Agentic AI Agents and other modern AI tools to build platforms on BTP Architecture.

We are planning to go for Silver partnership. Claude Mythos, which is one of the most powerful Model which has been tested in closed group of top tech companies. Capability of this model is it can hack any strongest tech company across the globe. Anthropic has shared this with 50 top most companies.

My doubt is whether SAP is in that 50 companies or not

Reference link:
https://anthropic.com/claude-mythos-preview-risk-report

entry.title: SAP Build app subscription failed_Trail Account
entry.content:
Hello Team ,

 

Good day !

My SAP Build App subscription is failing and showing below error message .

Could you please anyone guide me to resolve this issue.

 

Looking forward to hearing from you 🙂

Thanks & Regards

Gayathri Suresh

entry.title: How to create QR code in SAP
entry.content:
When a QR code is scanned, the system should automatically retrieve and display the following information:

  • Material Number
  • Batch Number
  • Quantity
  • Production Order (if applicable)
  • Plant / Storage Location
  • Inspection Lot details (if Quality Management is active)
  • Stock status

The key questions to address are:

  1. Which system is responsible for generating the QR code?
  2. How can the required master and transactional data be fetched and displayed after scanning the QR code?

entry.title: Unable to add the SAP BPA in theSubscription
entry.content:
Hi, 

Please help me here, as I am unable to add the SAP Build Process Automation Subscription in the SAP BTP Cockpit. Also, I have tried multiple times by deleting the failed one and adding the new one from the Marketplace.

Attached the screenshot for reference.

entry.title: Error Destination, related to SAP Automation, Joule Skill and Action
entry.content:
-Update 15.05.2026-

// Already Solved. Sorry there's different type when i maintain variable Destination in Action Automation. I notice this when opening JS Script in C:\Users\{user}\AppData\Local\SAP\Intelligent RPA\Projects\{automation_id}\automations

Hi everyone, hope you are all having a great day!

I am currently running into an issue with a destination configuration in SAP Build Process Automation and would appreciate any guidance.

My Scenario: I have built a RAP application and I am using the exposed API to trigger a "Create" method via SAP Build.

What is Working: The API is functioning perfectly outside of the automation. I have successfully tested and triggered it using:

  • Postman

  • SAP Build "Actions"

  • Joule Skills

The Issue: The problem occurs when I try to execute this same step inside an Automation. It fails and throws the following error log:

"The provided destination does not follow the expected structure. Please contact support"

Has anyone encountered this specific destination error when transitioning an API call from an Action to an Automation? Are there additional destination properties or formatting rules specifically required for Automations that I might be missing?

Thanks in advance for your help

{
	"type": "automationActivity",
	"name": "irpa_core.log",
	"label": "Add new entity to PRODUCT_HEADER",
	"inputs": [
		"The provided destination does not follow the expected structure. Please contact support.",
		{
			"key": "Error",
			"value": 1
		},
		null,
		true
	],
	"containerInstanceUid": "...",
	"parentInstanceUid": "...",
	"stepId": "4",
	"line": 8,
	"file": "triggerAPI.js"
}

Here my destination, related properties already being maintain

Testing in Action on SAP Build

Testing in Joule Skill

Testing in SAP Automation

entry.title: SAP BTP Trial Account Phone Verification Issue During Activation
entry.content:
Hello,

I am currently trying to activate my SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) Trial account, but I am unable to complete the phone verification process.

I did not receive the SMS verification code, and the platform displays the following message:

“We did not send a code because you are not authorized to request phone calls. Please contact your system administrator.”

This is a personal/student trial account, so I do not have a system administrator to contact.

I have already verified that my phone number is entered correctly in international format, but the issue still persists.

Could someone please advise how to resolve this issue or indicate the appropriate support channel for trial account verification problems?

Thank you in advance for your assistance.

entry.title: Same issue occurred in bo version sp5 but not able to delete from front end as well as backend
entry.content: Same issue occurred in bo version sp5 but not able to delete from front end as well as backend

entry.title: I want to deep dive into SAP with AI
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I want to deep dive into SAP with AI and build a strong career in this field. I am a beginner and looking for guidance from experienced professionals.

Could you please suggest:

  • The best SAP modules or domains to learn with AI integration
  • Courses or certifications that have good future opportunities
  • A beginner-friendly learning path
  • Which area has better demand in the future (SAP BTP, SAP AI Core, S/4HANA, SAP Analytics Cloud, SAP ABAP with AI, etc.)

I come from a beginner background, so I would really appreciate recommendations on where to start and how to progress step by step.

Thanks in advance for your guidance!

entry.title: BTP Trial Registration - Phone Verification Blocked
entry.content:
Hi SAP Team,

I am an aspiring developer trying to register for an SAP BTP Trial account, but I am stuck at the telephone verification step. I keep receiving the following error message:

"We did not send you a code because you are not allowed to request phone calls. Please contact your system administrator."

I am registering from Indonesia. I have tried using different networks (ensuring no VPN is active), clearing my browser cache, and using Incognito mode, but the issue persists.

Could a moderator please assist me in unblocking my registration? I can provide my phone number via Direct Message if needed.

Thank you, Muzayyin Arifin

Attached screenshots for your reference. 

Note that I have already referred this KBA, I don't have any formations either.

Kindly do the needful.

Thanks

entry.title: Trial Cloud Identity Services: first administrator never received activation email
entry.content:
Hi,

I created an SAP BTP free trial account (created on 2026-05-28) and subscribed to Cloud Identity Services (Subscriptions / default plan, TEST) in my trial subaccount. The subscription shows as "Subscribed" and the IAS tenant appears to be provisioned:

- Tenant: a25augyla.trial-accounts.ondemand.com
- Account email: scarronefrancisco23@gmail.com
- SAP Universal ID: P2012547509

The problem: I never received the "Activate Your Account for Identity Authentication Service" onboarding email for the first administrator. I checked inbox, spam and all folders and it never arrived. Without it I cannot set the password for the admin user, so I cannot log in to the admin console (the /admin URL redirects to the tenant's own SAML2 IdP login and rejects my credentials).

What I have already tried, without success:
- "Forgot password" at https://adgpsxyq1.trial-accounts.ondemand.com/admin -> no reset email received
- Self-service page https://iamtenants.accounts.cloud.sap/ -> returns HTTP 500 (likely because this is a trial / Universal ID)
- Deleted and re-created the Cloud Identity Services subscription -> still no onboarding email

Could someone from the IAS team please check the provisioning status of this tenant and either re-trigger the administrator onboarding email, or confirm that the admin user (scarronefrancisco23@gmail.com) exists so that "Forgot password" can work?

Thanks in advance.
